policy: Public, consented, video-backed people records only. No private contact fields.

people.headline: Founder of HiRey, building an agent-amplified trusted connector network
people.summary: Walter Wu explains the HiRey thesis from the Launch Map stage: agents can do the workflow around finding people, follow-up, and scheduling, while trusted humans keep judgment, vouching, and high-stakes introductions.

people.headline: Full-stack engineer and AI builder looking for an autonomous product role in San Francisco
people.summary: Zubair Zafar talks about coming from Pakistan to the U.S., earning a full-ride Master's in Computer Science at Eastern Illinois University, building multi-agent real-estate workflows, doing MRI computer-vision research, and moving to San Francisco to join a meaningful builder community.

extra_videos.title: Cloudflare plasma wall explainer
extra_videos.description: Zubair explains the plasma wall outside Cloudflare's office and how physical randomness can be used as a source for encryption.

people.headline: UCSD cognitive science graduate and Startup Incubator community builder
people.summary: Curtis Chen is a recent UCSD graduate from Taiwan with a background in cognitive science, machine learning, and neurocomputation. In this long-form conversation, he explains how Startup Incubator helps students move from ideas to teams, resources, and early startups, and how his own path led him toward human-centered technology and community building.
